nasb.text: Now when John, while imprisoned, heard of the works of Christ, he sent word by his disciples

esv.text: Now when John heard in prison about the deeds of the Christ, he sent word by his disciples

cnv.text: 約翰在監獄裡聽見基督所作的，就派門徒去問他：

ccb.text: 约翰在监狱中听到基督所做的事，就差两个门徒去问祂：

csbs.text: 约翰在监狱里听说了基督所做的事，就派自己的几个门徒去
